series_description: Records used in the procurement of system hardware and software including request for proposals, proposals, quotations and bids, benchmark/acceptance testing information, correspondence, duplicate copies of contracts, purchase orders, technical reviews, and vendor information including references and literature on the firm or product line.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires, or until the warranties expire, whichever is longer

series_description: Contrant encumbrances, procurements, complaints to vendors, and related contract documents
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires, or until the warranties expire, whichever is longer

series_description: Maintenance contracts for data processing equipment, and related records including copies of contracts, service histories, and work orders.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires, or until the warranties expire, whichever is longer

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations adn other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months If correspondence documents or relates to a specific construction project, it shall be kept for 16 years as set forth in GAR-C-03(A)

series_title: All Bidding Documents, RFP''s, RFQ''s or Similar D
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years If bidding documents relate to a specific construction project, the documents shall be kept for 16 years as set forth in GAR-C-03(A)

series_description: Used to establish descriptive information for each capital project and to update perviously entered capital projects data.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all descrepancies are resolved

series_description: Project construction contracts and all records and files for a specfic construction project.
Includes negatives, prints, slides, transparencies, and related items.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is no longer current

series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal, and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years If correspondence documents or relates to a specific construction project, it shall be kept for 16 years as set forth in GAR-C-03(A)

series_description: Official minutes, orders and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value
